'''zhazhana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicery|nicery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicery|nicery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhazhana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzhænæth|zhæzhænæth]] || [[word:zhæzhænæj|zhæzhænæj]] || [[word:zhæzhænæsh|zhæzhænæsh]] || [[word:zhæzhænæ|zhæzhænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhazhanath|zhazhazhanath]] || [[word:zhazhazhanaj|zhazhazhanaj]] || [[word:zhazhazhanash|zhazhazhanash]] || [[word:zhazhazhana|zhazhazhana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhanath|zhazhanath]] || [[word:zhazhanaj|zhazhanaj]] || [[word:zhazhanash|zhazhanash]] || [[word:zhazhana|zhazhana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhafnath|zhazhafnath]] || [[word:zhazhafnaj|zhazhafnaj]] || [[word:zhazhafnash|zhazhafnash]] || [[word:zhazhafnaf|zhazhafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazhanatha|zhazhanatha]] || [[word:zhazhanaja|zhazhanaja]] || [[word:zhazhanasha|zhazhanasha]] || [[word:zhazhanaka|zhazhanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazhanath|zhazhanath]] || [[word:zhazhanaj|zhazhanaj]] || [[word:zhazhanash|zhazhanash]] || [[word:zhazhana|zhazhana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazhanathal|zhazhanathal]] || [[word:zhazhanajal|zhazhanajal]] || [[word:zhazhanashal|zhazhanashal]] || [[word:zhazhanakal|zhazhanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazhanathatha|zhazhanathatha]] || [[word:zhazhanajaja|zhazhanajaja]] || [[word:zhazhanashasha|zhazhanashasha]] || [[word:zhazhanaka|zhazhanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazhanathan|zhazhanathan]] || [[word:zhazhanajan|zhazhanajan]] || [[word:zhazhanashan|zhazhanashan]] || [[word:zhazhanakan|zhazhanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazhanathaoro|zhazhanathaoro]] || [[word:zhazhanajaoro|zhazhanajaoro]] || [[word:zhazhanashaoro|zhazhanashaoro]] || [[word:zhazhanakaoro|zhazhanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
